title: KZ-2D record real cleanup
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
tasks = queue.get('tasks', [])
if not any(t.get('id') == 'KZ-4' for t in tasks):
    tasks.append({'id':'KZ-4','title':'Repair object passports and release proof manifest','status':'PENDING','depends_on':['KZ-2'],'criteria':'object_passports files and release_proof_manifest valid JSON; kz4_passports_status.json all_valid true','touch_workflows':False})
for task in tasks:
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-2':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = 'c708549e49dc0641f9f3b5ad5dc46edef213ce45'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:11:56Z'
        task['real_ssot_cleanup'] = True
    if task.get('id') == 'KZ-4' and task.get('status') != 'DONE':
        task['status'] = 'PENDING'
queue['tasks'] = tasks
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T15:13:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'HAS_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'execute first PENDING task: KZ-4'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T15:11:56Z','id':'KZ-2','trace_id':'kz2c_real_ssot_duplicate_cleanup','sha':'c708549e49dc0641f9f3b5ad5dc46edef213ce45','status':'done','real_ssot_cleanup':True,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + NL
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ2D_RECORD_REAL_SSOT_CLEANUP.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-2D','trace_id':'kz2d_record_real_ssot_cleanup','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'KZ-2','recorded_sha':'c708549e49dc0641f9f3b5ad5dc46edef213ce45','activated':'KZ-4','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-4 repair object passports and release proof manifest'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ2D_RECORD_REAL_SSOT_CLEANUP.md')
report.write_text('# KZ-2D | Record real SSOT cleanup and activate KZ-4' + NL + 'Status: completed' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'KZ-2 real SSOT cleanup recorded with SHA c708549e49dc0641f9f3b5ad5dc46edef213ce45. KZ-4 is PENDING in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json.' + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL + NL + 'Next: KZ-4 repair object passports and release proof manifest.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
